review_title: Perfect tool for tracking program performance
author: Areeba Z.
pros: We often have to track how effective our community programs and work programs are for employees and youth. I use this tool often to track the performance of each program. What I love about this program is that it brings together all the tools needed for performance management such as goals, feedbacks forms, etc. We can easily gather feedback from employees, coordinators and the community to analyze the programs we have in place. It is quite reasonably priced, which is a plus.
cons: The software isnt as advances as id like and it can be such an agitating task when trying to alter the forms.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The flexible system for your HR Goals
description: We have been around for 4 - 5 years with a platform and are really satisfied with it.
author: Elena D.
pros: Flexibility of building process, questions, scales, etc. It gives great opportunities to build different HR processes like performance review, assessment of goals, 360 feedback, peer feedback, etc.
cons: From my side, I would love to recommend working with UX/UI, it would also be cool to continue working on simplification and reducing the manual work of the administrator.

review_title: It's a good solution if you need a basic feedback software
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It covers our basic needs in terms of feedback/performace reviews. For the users it's quite clear and easy to use.
cons: It could be much more functional, with a nicer and clearer organization and interface. It looks vintage.

description: Was great, [sensitive content hidden] was super helpful in the initial onboarding. Different timezone didn't hinder productivity.
author: Veronica C.
pros: So helpful, very user friends, quick reports created. Perfect for what we wanted!

description: Excellent. Received a lot of support from Manni Singh. He was patient and helpful with all of my set up questions and offered ongoing guidance. We only needed the 360 and Primalogik really streamlined our ability to run this process well.
author: Anne S.
pros: The system was easy to set up for 360 feedback. The 360 questions could be edited and adapted for our firm and its values. Employees found it easy to complete their reviewing responsibilities. You can decide where you would like to add a comments area and open ended questions requiring a response. The reporting was customized and well received by the participants.
cons: Nothing, I was concerned it would be hard for an HR professional without in house tech to implement but everything worked!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The tool works as it should to review others. When sending 360 Reviews to managers, it cleanly creates a file. Batch operations is great.
cons: When any org changes need to be made it is tedious and not fluid. You must make changes for one user in multiple locations on the site. The Department section is messy as well.

review_title: user friendly, fast to learn no issues
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: customer service is excellent, very quick in response, never had to wait for answer or technical support!
cons: I do not really have any issues. No problems with the software or the site or the support team. there is nothing to report.

review_title: Great HR tool even without a proper HR department
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ability to create and track management performance.
cons: Wasn't easily integrated with our sales platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Easy to manage employee reviews and questionnaires for exit interviews, feedback, and other questions regarding the company.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use for employees and employers. I like that it can be customized to ask any questions, multiple choice, leave comments, etc. as well as rate immediately.
cons: It is not easy to set-up the system for employees the very firs time you start doing reviews. We have a lot of different employee systems and each one is a little different. This beginning process is very time consuming.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Allows me to track the performance of my workforce, team and company overall. Shows me where the weaknesses are and what areas need improvement. This software allows me to record performance appraisals and send feedback forms to employees and other coworkers. These feedback forms help us evaluate our strengths as weaknesses as a team, and allow us to take an active approach to improve upon our weaknesses.
cons: The software does not allow me to edit and modify feedback forms, and the software can be slow at times.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Primalogik has allowed us to shift our culture to one that embraces transparency and feedback. We still have work to do, but utilizing Primalogik has allowed us to place the cornerstone for the foundation of this culture change.
author: Chad B.
pros: The ability house all of the 360 feedback in one place, easy to reference (both employee, manager, and admin views), and easy to generate meaningful data via reporting
cons: If extensions on a review are needed, as an admin, I need to manually adjust for every employee. Would really like to see a function that allows for both individual extensions AND a mass extension for all participants at once.

review_title: Primalogik 360--an excellent tool with superior customer service and support
description: When our organization was searching for a performance support tool that would allow us to measure pre- and post-program data for 260 managers, the capabilities, cost and user-friendliness of the Primalogik 360 tool were standouts. As I was the person who needed to manage the implementation and rollout of the tool, on top of my many others tasks, it was essential that the tool was easy to set-up and that the use of the product was intuitive for end-users. The Primalogik 360 platform has delivered on all of these points. But what really stands out, and sets Primalogik apart, is the dedication and support shown by the CEOs and Co-founders, Gabriel Dominguez Martin and David Lévesque. They have gone the extra mile in ensuring that the tool meets my business needs that I receive regular reports, and that custom modifications have gone into effect in a timely manner. They are responsive in addressing my many questions and concerns. I have especially appreciated the collaborative/brainstorming approach they have taken with me in regards to product enhancements. I highly recommend both Primalogik 360 as a reliable, effective tool, as well as the outstanding consultative service provided by the Primalogik 360 team. Please do not hesitate to contact me if you would like to discuss my recommendation further.
author: Suzanne D.
Ken G.
pros: Ease of use, workflow and features. Simple integration with existing HR system (Bamboo). All in one performance management solution.
cons: Nothing comes to mind. The product satisfies all needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Suzanne G.
pros: Love how easy it is to use. It was very easy to roll out to our company.
cons: I wish there was a way to "like" or "love" feedback that our team is sharing and tagging folks in. I don't always have time to actually comment, so it would be great if I could just "like" or "love" comments so that the team knows that I saw them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We have run a 360° appraisal the first time in the company and also the first time with Primalogik in H1-2016. We had set up the questionnaire by ourselves and are now reviewing where the questionnaire needs to be adjusted further. There were no problems to handle the SaaS tool neither from employee nor manager side.
author: Annette D.
pros: The possibility to design the tailor-made questionnaires, also to create surveys. The newly created function for managers to make notes related to the employees being evaluated during the period. This is very helpful.
cons: We miss an extracting function where we can summerize the individual results in one spreadsheet. The filtered appraisal results had been collected by hand in a spreadsheet to compare the employees in one department, to see on one view how the peers had evaluated them, to figure out the difference between the manager and peer evaluation.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great performance review software made even better by fantastic customer service.
description: Our HR department was asked to look around for a performance review software that was easy to use and not too complicated. Primalogik was the best one we found by far. Not only is it simple to use, without any unnecessary complications, but the customer service is so personalised and efficient that any problems we have are resolved straight away. We found there were a few features that we wanted, so we asked the guys at Primalogik if they could add them for us and they did, straight away. You can't really get any better than that. I would definitely recommend this software.
author: Abbey S.

description: Many times businesses offer canned solutions through software without customer service to back up their use. If something doesn't seem to work right or if you don't know how to do something, you may be referred to some cryptic knowledgebase. Not so with Primalogik. Their customer service is excellent. I have found them to be available both by phone and live chat and extremely helpful. So far, we're very pleased with the software itself. It provides an excellent way to review staff and conduct 360's.
author: Steve D.

review_title: This has been a very useful easy tool to use for our 360 peer reviews.
description: The set up was quite easy, and we received the support we needed. The reports themselves are well laid out. I do appreciate the auto reminder emails that get sent out. This has really streamlined our 360 review process.
author: Lia D.

description: I was looking for a quick solution to use for employee reviews and by accident found Primalogik. It offered the flexibility I was seeking. My team and I were very impressed with how easy it was to use the product. The customer service we received is unmatched by any other product that I have implemented. The Primalogik team worked with us to make our experience terrific. We have over 200 employees across the country and from a user perspective, there was virtually no training necessary to roll this out. I would recommend this product and company to other HR Professionals looking for the flexibility that Primalogik offers.
author: Debra J.

description: While the software is great, representative has been amazing! Responsive, knowledgeable, helpful. I couldn't say enough good things about the support I've gotten from him
author: Donna H.
pros: Easy to set up and use. It had more functionality than I expected and a lot of mistake-proofing that made life easier.
cons: The application I used it for was unique--a 360 leadership assessment for a client. There were some analyses I needed that I had to do myself, i.e., summary stats and 9-box grid.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Have been using Primalogik for a few years. Love the ease of use and tailoring capabilities. Customer support is great. Have had a few questions answered promptly. We will continue to use Primalogik.
author: kathy S.

review_title: Very simple but very logic and great tool with great functions!
description: It was exactly what we were searching for in order to collect self-reviews of colleagues as well as 360-degree feedback. Quite intuitive, easy to use, logical functions etc. It served exactly what we needed and did not overwhelm us with too many unnecessary features like some comparable tools we searched for.
author: Laura B.

description: While employee feedback is an important part of employee performance management, it can easily be skipped by managers due to the difficult nature of compiling results and ensuring anonymity and confidentiality of results. Primalogik 360 seeks to make this process easier by creating forms pre-populated with the criteria many businesses use to evaluate employees.
author: Stephanie Faris
pros: Easy to use, notification reminders make it easy to remind supervisors

review_title: Easy to use and learn yet very efficient.
description: I used Primalogik360 to peer review two distinct groups of about 12 people in total. I ended up sending 54 peer reviews to be completed. The whole exercise would have taken me between 15 and 20 hours more had I just used what I did a few years ago, i.e., Excel spreadsheet with graphs and manual pivot tables. This tool allowed me to focus on the task at hand and my employees; getting the burden of the administration and distribution out of the process of capturing valuable peer reviews.
author: Anibal J.

review_title: Really strong easy to use software with great support
description: From my first email the support has been excellent. Very willing to demo the software and to brainstorm ways to meet our needs.
author: Cindy P.
cons: To achieve this level of ease of use there are tradeoffs. There are a few features I would like to see added and the good news is their team is very transparent with the road map while sticking to their goal of simplicity.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
